metadata.name: settlement_sale
metadata.description: Settlement Sale program for Sonar public sales on Solana

instructions.name: cancel_bid
docs: Cancels the caller's entire bid and refunds their committed tokens.
On Solana each wallet must call this independently, unlike the EVM
contract which cancels all entity wallets in one transaction.

instructions.name: place_bid
docs: Places or updates a bid in the sale.
Verifies the Ed25519 signature via instruction introspection,
validates the permit, checks entity ownership, enforces monotonic
constraints and lockup rules, and transfers tokens to the vault.

types.name: EntityState
docs: Tracks an entity's bid state within a sale.
An entity can receive contributions from multiple wallets (additive).
The total amount is the sum of all wallet contributions.
Seeds: ["entity_state", sale.key(), entity_id]

fields.name: is_initialized
docs: Whether this entity state has been initialized.
Required because `init_if_needed` doesn't distinguish first-time creation
from subsequent loads in instruction logic.

fields.name: entity_id
docs: Unique identifier for this entity (UUID as bytes).

fields.name: sale
docs: The sale this entity belongs to.

fields.name: current_amount
docs: Current committed amount (monotonic: can only increase during Commitment).

fields.name: accepted_amount
docs: Total amount accepted (allocated) across all wallets for this entity.
Updated during Settlement when allocations are set.

fields.name: current_price
docs: Current bid price (monotonic: can only increase).

fields.name: lockup
docs: Whether this entity has opted into lockup. Once true, cannot be set false.

fields.name: refunded
docs: Whether this entity has been fully refunded (cancellation or Done-stage refund).
Prevents new bids on an already-cancelled entity.

fields.name: total_refunded
docs: Total amount refunded to wallets on this entity during the Done stage.
When this equals `current_amount - accepted_amount`, all wallets have been refunded.

fields.name: wallet_count
docs: Number of distinct wallets that have contributed to this entity.
Used to enforce max_wallets_per_entity.

fields.name: last_bid_timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp of the last bid.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: PurchasePermitV3
docs: PurchasePermitV3 for Solana.
Uses a 32-byte Solana pubkey for the wallet field.

fields.name: sale_specific_entity_id
docs: The sale-specific entity ID (UUID as bytes).

fields.name: sale_uuid
docs: The sale UUID.

fields.name: wallet
docs: The Solana wallet pubkey (32 bytes).

fields.name: expires_at
docs: Unix timestamp when this permit expires.

fields.name: min_amount
docs: Minimum bid amount allowed.

fields.name: max_amount
docs: Maximum bid amount allowed.

fields.name: min_price
docs: Minimum price allowed.

fields.name: max_price
docs: Maximum price allowed.

fields.name: opens_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the commitment window opens.

fields.name: closes_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the commitment window closes.

fields.name: payload
docs: Opaque payload bytes for off-chain use. Not decoded by the program.

types.name: SettlementSale
docs: Configuration and global state account for a SettlementSale.
Seeds: ["settlement_sale", sale_uuid]

fields.name: sale_uuid
docs: Unique identifier for this sale (UUID as bytes).

fields.name: permit_signer
docs: Public key of the backend permit signer (Ed25519).

fields.name: payment_token_mint
docs: SPL token mint for payments (e.g., USDC).

fields.name: vault
docs: Token account (vault) that holds committed funds.

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin authority that can manage this sale.

fields.name: proceeds_receiver
docs: Receives the accepted (non-refunded) proceeds after settlement.

fields.name: stage
docs: Current lifecycle stage.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed for the sale account.

fields.name: vault_bump
docs: PDA bump seed for the vault account.

fields.name: is_paused
docs: Whether the sale is currently paused (emergency use).

fields.name: claim_refund_enabled
docs: Whether wallets can self-service their Done-stage refunds via `claim_refund`.

fields.name: reduce_commitment_enabled
docs: Whether wallets can partially reduce their commitment via `reduce_commitment`.

fields.name: max_wallets_per_entity
docs: Maximum number of distinct wallets that can contribute to one entity.

fields.name: total_committed
docs: Total amount committed across all entities (decreases on cancellation).

fields.name: total_cancelled
docs: Total amount cancelled during the Cancellation stage (audit tracking).

fields.name: total_accepted
docs: Total amount accepted (allocated) during Settlement.

fields.name: total_refunded
docs: Total amount refunded during the Done stage.

fields.name: total_withdrawn
docs: Total amount withdrawn to the proceeds receiver.

types.name: Stage
docs: The lifecycle stages of a settlement sale.
Transitions (same as EVM):
PreOpen -> Commitment -> Cancellation -> Settlement -> Done
`-> Settlement -> Done

errors.name: InvalidEd25519Instruction
errors.msg: Ed25519 program instruction not found or invalid

errors.name: UnauthorizedSigner
errors.msg: The permit signer is not authorized

errors.name: InvalidWallet
errors.msg: Permit wallet doesn't match transaction signer

errors.name: InvalidSaleUuid
errors.msg: Permit sale_uuid doesn't match sale

errors.name: PermitExpired
errors.msg: Permit has expired

errors.name: BidTooEarly
errors.msg: Bid submitted before the commitment window opens

errors.name: BidTooLate
errors.msg: Bid submitted after the commitment window closes

errors.name: BidBelowMinAmount
errors.msg: Bid amount is below the permit minimum

errors.name: BidExceedsMaxAmount
errors.msg: Bid amount exceeds the permit maximum

errors.name: PriceBelowMinPrice
errors.msg: Bid price is below the permit minimum

errors.name: PriceExceedsMaxPrice
errors.msg: Bid price exceeds the permit maximum

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: AmountCannotDecrease
errors.msg: Bid amount cannot decrease from previous bid

errors.name: PriceCannotDecrease
errors.msg: Bid price cannot decrease from previous bid

errors.name: BidMustHaveLockup
errors.msg: This entity must opt into lockup as required by the permit

errors.name: BidLockupCannotBeUndone
errors.msg: Lockup cannot be removed once set on a bid

errors.name: EntityIdMismatch
errors.msg: Entity ID in permit doesn't match entity state

errors.name: AlreadyRefunded
errors.msg: Entity has already been refunded

errors.name: WalletAlreadyRefunded
errors.msg: This wallet has already been refunded

errors.name: WalletBoundToDifferentEntity
errors.msg: Wallet is already bound to a different entity

errors.name: MaxWalletsPerEntityExceeded
errors.msg: Maximum number of wallets per entity exceeded

errors.name: InvalidTokenAccountOwner
errors.msg: Invalid token account owner

errors.name: InvalidTokenMint
errors.msg: Invalid token mint

errors.name: InvalidStage
errors.msg: Operation not permitted in the current sale stage

errors.name: SalePaused
errors.msg: Sale is paused

errors.name: ReduceCommitmentDisabled
errors.msg: Reduce commitment is not enabled for this sale

errors.name: ReductionExceedsCommitment
errors.msg: Reduction amount exceeds committed amount

errors.name: ClaimRefundDisabled
errors.msg: Claim refund is not enabled for this sale

errors.name: AllocationExceedsCommitment
errors.msg: Allocation exceeds the wallet's committed amount

errors.name: UnexpectedTotalAcceptedAmount
errors.msg: Total accepted amount does not match expected value

errors.name: WithdrawalExceedsAvailable
errors.msg: Withdrawal amount exceeds available proceeds

errors.name: UnsupportedTokenProgram
errors.msg: Token-2022 mints are not supported

errors.name: ZeroProceedsReceiver
errors.msg: Proceeds receiver cannot be the zero address

errors.name: ZeroPermitSigner
errors.msg: Permit signer cannot be the zero address

errors.name: MaxWalletsPerEntityZero
errors.msg: Max wallets per entity must be greater than zero

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: SerializationError
errors.msg: Failed to serialize data

errors.name: InvalidPermitStructure
errors.msg: Permit has invalid structure (e.g., min > max or opens > closes)

errors.name: InvalidClockTimestamp
errors.msg: Clock timestamp is invalid

errors.name: AccountDataMismatch
errors.msg: Account data does not match expected values

errors.name: AllocationAlreadySet
errors.msg: Allocation already set; pass allow_overwrite to replace

errors.name: ZeroAuthority
errors.msg: New authority cannot be the zero address

errors.name: RoleNotHeld
errors.msg: Role is not held by this operator

errors.name: RoleAlreadyGranted
errors.msg: Role is already granted to this operator

errors.name: Ed25519InstructionMissing
errors.msg: Ed25519 instruction is missing at the expected preceding position

errors.name: Ed25519WrongProgram
errors.msg: Instruction at expected Ed25519 position has wrong program ID

errors.name: Ed25519MultipleSignatures
errors.msg: Ed25519 instruction must contain exactly one signature

errors.name: Ed25519MalformedData
errors.msg: Ed25519 instruction data is malformed or uses external data references

errors.name: Ed25519MessageMismatch
errors.msg: Signed message does not match expected permit bytes
